problem: How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure?
mechanism: Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix
hypothesis: How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Carbon. Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
